ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_AVM_UDS_VC_20200824
ddt:Target.Description:
[4]Aug 24th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified feedbacks.
[3]Aug 21st, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified many items, based on Rev4.
[2]Aug 5th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified Config items, based on Rev3.
[1]Jul 29th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified Config item, based on Rev2.
[N]Jul 22nd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Initial creation based on Rev2.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[B2A10](TBD)Rear camera diagnosis(communication diagnosis)Rear Camera COMM Line
[B2A11](TBD)Front camera diagnosis(communication diagnosis)Front Camera COMM Line
[B2A12](TBD)"Driver's side side camera diagnosis (communication diagnosis)Dr-Side Camera COMM Line"
[B2A13](TBD)"Side camera diagnosis on the front passenger seat (communication diagnosis)PASS-Side Camera COMM Line"
[C21F8](TBD)EPS rudder angle sensor abnormality diagnosis result
[C21FD](TBD)HEVC Axel pedal fail flag detection diagnosis result
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: Config.Data_$0100_#009_bit1_HMI_Tire angle icon on Top view
Config.Data_$0100_#012_bit6_HMI_TopView Predictive course line during AVM
Config.Data_$0100_#012_bit4_HMI_TopView Predictive course line during APA
Config.Data_$0100_#013_bit6_HMI_Side view permition on high speed

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC(00h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$051A_#004_bit0_(TBD)4 Average vehicle speed after filter application of wheel pulses
DataRead_$0605_#006_bit0_Left side param Right? rotatory direction
DataRead_$0606_#006_bit0_Right side param Left? rotatory direction
DataRead_$0300_#004_bit0_The Rear wide guide param X-axis
DataRead_$0300_#005_bit0_The Rear wide guide param Y-axis

Item.Text: Camera does not have calibration information(03h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$F0A4_#004_bit0_Read the result of SMC command[1]
DataRead_$F0A4_#005_bit0_Read the result of SMC command[2]
DataRead_$F0A4_#006_bit0_Read the result of SMC command[3]
DataRead_$F0A4_#013_bit0_Read the result of SMC command[4]

Item.Text: Vehicle State check in progress for Configuration(08h)

Data.Name: DataWrite.WS_$0306_#004_bit0_Page number of data during the Master Data transfer
DataWrite.WS_$0306_#005_bit0_Maximum Page number for the Master Data transfer
DataWrite.WS_$0306_#006_bit0_The calibration master data which are targeted for Master Data transfer
DataWrite.WS_$0605_#006_bit0_Left side param Right? rotatory direction
DataWrite.WS_$0606_#006_bit0_Right side param Left? rotatory direction

Item.Text: Change to "Copying by FOTA-Gateways in progress"
Change to "Copying by FOTA-Gateways in progress" for Configuration

Data.Name: Master Data overlay on camera view.value
Detected point overlay on camera view.value
Factory Self Calibration Master data checking.value

Item.Text: NG Arrow operation invalid (out of adjustment range)

Data.Name: Config.Data_$0100_#015_bit3_Designer Request_Store image at factory calibration

Item.Text: (TBD) engine rotation speed threshold or less(00h)
(TBD) Engine rotation speed threshold or more(01h)
